state_snapshot.overall_goal: Integrate openNURBS 8.x into Alice Viewer 2 and stabilize the CI/CD infrastructure.
state_snapshot.active_constraints: - **Build/Tooling**: LLVM clang-cl, Ninja, C++17, Static Runtime (/MT). - **CI/CD**: Enforced Ninja and Clang/LLVM for all runners. - **Architecture**: vcpkg overlay ports resolved via CMake `VCPKG_OVERLAY_PORTS`.
state_snapshot.key_knowledge: - **vcpkg Configuration**: Custom git registries with relative paths are forbidden by Git. - **Overlay Resolution**: Moving `VCPKG_OVERLAY_PORTS` to `CMakeLists.txt` and using `vcpkg.json` overrides ensures reliable port resolution in manifest mode without custom registries. - **Runtime Consistency**: `x64-windows-static` triplet is required to match the `/MT` mandate for openNURBS and other dependencies.
state_snapshot.artifact_trail: - `vcpkg-configuration.json`: Removed custom git registry. - `CMakeLists.txt`: Added `VCPKG_OVERLAY_PORTS` and `VCPKG_TARGET_TRIPLET` (for Windows). - `vcpkg.json`: Added `overrides` for `opennurbs` to satisfy manifest resolution. - `.github/workflows/build.yml`: Updated to install toolchains on Linux and enforce Ninja/Clang.
state_snapshot.task_state: 1. [DONE] Eradicate local git registry from vcpkg-configuration.json. 2. [DONE] Migrate overlay port mapping to CMakeLists.txt. 3. [DONE] Repair CI/CD pipeline with toolchain enforcement. 4. [DONE] Verify local build success with static runtime. 5. [DONE] Prepare for commit.
